elasticsearch.title: Search Engine Core
elasticsearch.description: Control center for monitoring and managing all search indexes.

descriptions.inSync: Data between MongoDB and Elasticsearch is in sync.
descriptions.esAhead: Elasticsearch has {{difference}} more documents than MongoDB. Please check.
descriptions.dbAhead: MongoDB has {{difference}} more documents than Elasticsearch. Please reindex.

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.description: The control panel for {{module}} index is being connected to ELK Stack.

toolbox.title: Management Toolbox
toolbox.syncDescription: Force re-sync a specific ID from DB to ES.

dashboard.headerSubtitle: Operational statistics and centralized Elasticsearch cluster control

switchAlias.title: Confirm Switch?
switchAlias.description: You are requesting to switch the search Alias to index {{indexName}}. The search system will start using data from this index immediately.

deleteIndex.title: Delete Index Permanently?
deleteIndex.description: Are you sure you want to delete physical index {{indexName}}? This action cannot be undone and data in this index will be permanently lost.

deadEvents.title: Dead Events (DLQ) Details
deadEvents.description: List of documents that failed to sync due to system errors or infrastructure connectivity issues.
deadEvents.empty: Excellent! No dead events found in DLQ.

userTab.deadEventsTooltip: {{count}} records failed to sync. Click for details.

tooltips.totalDocs: Total number of documents currently in Elasticsearch for this module.
tooltips.storageSize: Disk space consumed by these documents in the cluster.
tooltips.currentIndex: The actual (physical) identifier of the index receiving search data.
tooltips.aliasName: Named alias used for querying without worrying about physical index versions.
tooltips.shards: Number of data shards. Helps optimize search speed and data writing.
tooltips.replicas: Number of backups. Ensures the system stays operational if a node fails.
tooltips.mongodbCount: Total number of records currently in the MongoDB database.
tooltips.esCount: Total number of records successfully synchronized to Elasticsearch.
tooltips.integrity: The data discrepancy between MongoDB (Source) and Elasticsearch (Destination).
tooltips.dlq: Number of failed synchronization requests currently in the Kafka error queue.

reindexAll.title: Confirm Operational Sync
reindexAll.description: Trigger a full data synchronization for the selected module. This action will refresh all relevant search records.

messages.errorReindexUser: Failed to push document to ES
messages.retryDeadEventsSuccess: Reprocessing of failed events started: {{count}} documents
messages.retryDeadEventsError: Unable to reprocess failed events at this time

dlq.title: DLQ INCIDENT MANAGEMENT
dlq.subtitle: Kafka dead-letter queue centralized control and operational statistics
dlq.noData: No incidents found matching the criteria

modal.title: DLQ Incident Details
modal.subtitle: Detailed information about Kafka to Elasticsearch sync failure.

errors.retryAll: Error occurred while retrying all records
errors.retryDuration: Error occurred while retrying by duration
errors.retryBulk: Error occurred while retrying selected records
